title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
awards: National Library of China Wenjin Prize (2018)
author_biography: Yuval Noah Harari (born 1976, Haifa, Israel) is an Israeli historian, philosopher, and professor at the Hebrew University of Jerusalem. He received his PhD from the University of Oxford in 2002 and specializes in world, medieval, and military history. He co-founded Sapienship, a social impact company, in 2019.
author_credentials: PhD, University of Oxford; Professor of History, Hebrew University of Jerusalem
related_works: Homo Deus: A Brief History of Tomorrow (2016)
Nexus: A Brief History of Information Networks (2024)
